layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with full-width footer. The slide uses a side-by-side arrangement with two equal-width content columns occupying the upper 75% of the slide body, followed by a full-width footer bar at the bottom. Each column is a self-contained card with a filled header bar, icon badge, subtitle, and bullet list content. The layout emphasizes visual symmetry and equal weight between the two service offerings. A generous top margin separates the title from the content area. The footer spans the full slide width and sits at the bottom with a small gap above it. All elements snap to a 2-column grid with consistent gutters. The design uses the Filled-Header Block Table pattern (Section 4, Option B) adapted for side-by-side service cards.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.48, 0.48, 0.04]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM CARD): Left column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at left edge of content area. This is a vertical card structure with four sections stacked top-to-bottom: (1) Icon badge at top — a small circular badge with brand accent fill containing a laptop/monitor icon in white, positioned at top-left of the card with a small inset from the card edge. (2) Filled header bar immediately below the badge — solid brand dark fill (dark navy), full card width, compact height (just enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset), white bold text reading 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in all-caps, left-aligned with small left padding. (3) Subtitle text below header — light grey italic text reading 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities', left-aligned, small top margin below the header bar. (4) Bullet list section filling remaining card height — six bullet points describing platform capabilities, using brand-color circle bullet markers (small, proportional to body text height), body font, brand text color, left-aligned with moderate left inset. Bullet text: 'Blockchain monitoring', 'Entity identification & attribution', 'Automated risk scoring', 'Analytics of VASP data', 'Investigation workbench', 'Dashboards & analytics'. The entire card has a white background, thin brand-color border, visibly rounded corners, and a subtle even light grey shadow glow for card lift effect. Generous internal padding on all sides. The card height extends from below the title to just above the footer area, filling approximately 75% of the vertical slide body space.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING CARD): Right column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at right edge of content area, equal-peers with LEFT COLUMN. This card mirrors the exact structural pattern of the left column: (1) Icon badge at top — circular badge with brand accent fill containing a graduation cap icon in white, positioned at top-left of the card. (2) Filled header bar — solid brand dark fill (dark navy), full card width, compact height, white bold text reading 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in all-caps, left-aligned. (3) Subtitle text — light grey italic text reading 'Training & Knowledge Transfer', left-aligned, small top margin. (4) Bullet list section — six bullet points describing training offerings, using brand-color circle bullet markers, body font, brand text color, left-aligned. Bullet text: 'Foundation training for all staff', 'Practitioner certification', 'Specialist programs', 'Leadership briefings', 'Hands-on labs', 'Case study workshops'. The card has identical visual treatment to the left column: white background, thin brand-color border, visibly rounded corners, subtle even light grey shadow glow. Generous internal padding. The card height matches the left column exactly — both cards share identical top and bottom edges (Rule B2). The two cards are separated by a 4% horizontal gutter (consistent with Rule B3).
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width footer bar spanning 100% of slide width, positioned at the bottom of the slide with a small vertical gap above it (approximately 3% of slide height separating it from the bottom edge of the two cards above). The bar has a compact height — just tall enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset padding. Fill: brand accent color. No border. Corners: slightly rounded (softer than sharp, but less rounded than the content cards). Text: white, body font, regular weight, horizontally centered and vertically centered within the bar. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs'. The bar sits at a fixed position at the bottom of the slide, anchored to the slide's bottom safe-area margin.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide is well-filled by the two content cards and footer bar. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The cards themselves provide sufficient visual structure and the white slide background is appropriate for this layout.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are independent service offerings with no visual relationship requiring connectors.

_reference_violations.description: C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM CARD): text block occupies approximately 35% of container inner height — severely under-filled. More than half the container is empty white space below the bullet list.

C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING CARD): text block occupies approximately 30% of container inner height — severely under-filled. More than half the container is empty white space below the bullet list.

_reference_critique:
C0 (TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM CARD): text block occupies ~35% of container height — severely under-filled. The bullet list ends far above the bottom of the card, leaving more than half the container as empty space. SVGSketcher must increase body font size from current size (appears to be ~16pt) toward 22pt until text fills at least 65% of the container inner height. Also increase line-height proportionally to maintain readability.

C1 (CAPACITY BUILDING CARD): text block occupies ~30% of container height — severely under-filled. The bullet list ends far above the bottom of the card, leaving more than half the container as empty space. SVGSketcher must increase body font size from current size (appears to be ~16pt) toward 22pt until text fills at least 65% of the container inner height. Apply the same font size and line-height as C0 to preserve within-slide uniformity.

Both cards have identical structural issues: the bullet lists are rendered too small for the available vertical space, creating large empty bands at the bottom of each card. The font size must be increased significantly to achieve proper fill ratio.
